title: leontodon brumati
intro: Leontodon brumati, also known as Autumn Hawkbit, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family and native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Leontodon brumati include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Leontodon brumati can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
